rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO TAX COSTS GRANTED. APPELLATE COSTS BECOME FINAL JUDGMENT IF NOT CONTESTED. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: WAGNER VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC.

rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. (JH)
MOTION DENIED. BURDER SHIFTED BY SPECIAL INTERROGATORY EVASIVE RESPONSES. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY DEPOSITION OF NELSON READ IN CONJUNCTION TO RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: HERTZBERG VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC*

rulings.Rulings: GRANT, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH GOVERNMENT CLAIMS REQUIREMENT, STATUTUE OF LIMITATIONS BARS BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAD CONSTRUCTIVE AND ACTUAL NOTICE OF RATES AND CHARGES, UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICE CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS UNDER TRINKLE, MANDAMUS INAPPOSITE, NO PROOF OF REGULATORY TAKING, AND NO WRITTEN CONTRACT. (PB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED NO DUTY BY LANDLORD UNDER PRESENT CIRCUMSTANCES. (KF(EX))

MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION SUFFICIENT TO SATISFY REQUIREMENT FOR NEW TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 657. SUFFICIENT EXPLANATION OF FAILURE TO PRESENT DEPOSITION TESTIMONY OF PASSANTINO AND TESTIMONY OF PASSANTINO IS MATERIAL. (MD)

rulings.Case Title: JAY GOOKSTETTER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC) et al
JOE MASSTAS et al VS. GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION DIST et al
JIM D HARLAN VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
JIM D HARLAN VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. KAISER SHIFTED BURDEN, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT REBUTTED IT. DEPOSITION TESTIMONY PLUS FAILURE TO RESPOND TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES/NO EXPLANATION GIVEN FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE DENIED. NO SPECIFIC SHOWING AS TO WHAT IS BEING SOUGHT, HOW IT MIGHT HELP, OR WHEN IT WILL BE OBTAINED. ALSO, A DISCRETIONARY CONTINUANCE IS NOT WARRANTED GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO KAISER'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: RALPH CHRISMAN et al VS. ACANDS, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PER CCP 437C(G).

rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP ANSELMO VS. JESSICA BOSWELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Sset Aside Vacate Tro And For Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: DENY:(1)THE ONLY EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS A DECLARATION FROM MR. HORNE AND AT THE TIME OF THE TRO, HE WAS NOT COUNSEL OF RECORD IN THIS MATTER; (2)PLAINTIFF FILED A DECLARATION ON 4/26 INDICATING THAT PROPER NOTICE WAS GIVEN; AND (3)THE TRO ALREADY EXPIRED. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GIACOBASSI et al VS. WILLIAM HO et al
rulings.Rulings: GRANTED. DEFENDANT FILED STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION TO THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
